title: Light and Cozy Cheesy Stir-Fry
description: A comforting and easy-to-make stir-fry dish loaded with melted cheese and a hint of fermented flavor. Perfect for a cozy evening in.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the mixed vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes or until they start to soften.
Add the fermented bean paste and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the light soy sauce and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the cheese and stir-fry until it's melted and well combined with the vegetables.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving dish and serve hot.
